title: Clerics Trade Totems!
description: A simple mod that adds the Totem of Undying to Master Cleric trades.
body:
This mod is pretty simple. It adds the ability for clerics at master level to be able to trade the totem of undying for 2 diamonds and 2 gold ingots.

**Made with MCreator**

## 
**Join the discord for support for mods!**
